purpose: Probe whether a ResourceManager retry anchor yields a healthier control-link action slot than the worker-side socket-reader anchor.

cases.eligibility_note: RM-specific control-link anchor. Tests whether ResourceManager channel recovery becomes distinguishable from the worker-RPC line when the selected alert points at the 8030 retry loop.
